info.title: .NET Core console app to update a database using EF migrations.

options.name: --assembly
options.description: The assemlby file containing the dbcontext creator (required)

options.name: --fullsql
options.description: Whether to dump full sql script file

options.name: --deltasql
options.description: Whether to dump delta sql script files

options.name: --path
options.description: The location to store script files, defaults to current folder

options.name: --historyschema
options.description: The schema for the history table (defaults to dbo).

options.name: --history
options.description:
The tablename for migration history (defaults to _SchemaHistory)
This tool requires the connection string option (use quotes around it when it has spaces) and the assembly option. It will migrate
the database (including creation) by default. You can optionally disable migration and/or use sql script generation options
